lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship — used to lay out the AX turret-tank fit.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Type-10 Defender ship page — manufacturer specs, anti-Thargoid feature notes, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, hardpoint/military-slot counts, and engineering blueprint data behind the AX build.

sources.label: Inara — Type-10 Defender
sources.what: Ship-specific stats, hardpoint & internal layout, and shipyard pricing for the AX-fitted figures.

sources.label: Fandom — Type-10 Defender
sources.what: Lakon hull profile, armour rating, and the ship's established anti-Thargoid combat role.
